title: 🧿 Forbidden System Deities
name: Forbidden System Deities
what_it_is: Beings born from closed or collapsed logical systems—math-gods of unprovable theorems, unsolvable paradoxes, and forbidden rule-sets.
how_to_use: she is built from Gödel’s rot—her form defies completion, her smile breaks axioms
he kneels to gods that cannot exist—his prayer coded in forbidden syntax
animation_behavior: Structures flicker in/out of consistency, symbols refuse to resolve, divine form pulses with contradiction ---
